title: U.S. Supreme Court — Orders of the Court (current Term)
description: Order List / miscellaneous-orders page for the current October Term (cert grants and denials, stays, and other orders), complementing fed-scotus-opinions' slip opinions. The two-digit {scotus_ot_term} placeholder is resolved automatically at build time (scripts/common.py: scotus_ot_term()), so no manual update is needed at the Term rollover. Client-updated table with no stable per-order list container, monitored by full-page fingerprint.
